texto: The telling of a lie is not only a sin or disgrace
autor: it is the beginning of a disorder in the soul set in by the puncturing from a spear coated by guilt
explicacao: Citação de it is the beginning of a disorder in the soul set in by the puncturing from a spear coated by guilt sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The telling of a lie is not only a sin or disgrace” articula reflexao, priyavrat-thareja, telling em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
